title: Part 5 – Phrases à compléter : finance & budget
instructions: Choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui complète correctement chaque phrase.

questions.sentence: The company's profits have increased ____ fifteen percent since last quarter.
The accountant ____ the figures twice before submitting the report.
questions.explanation: "before submitting" indique une action terminée avant l'envoi : prétérit "checked".

questions.sentence: Each department must stay ____ its allocated budget for the year.
The invoice ____ paid within thirty days of receipt.
questions.explanation: Voix passive avec modal : "should be paid".

questions.sentence: ____ rising costs, the company decided to postpone the office renovation.
questions.explanation: "Due to" + groupe nominal exprime la cause (contrairement à "Although", qui introduit une proposition complète).
